title: Building websites out of Monday

posts.author: saggi (Saggi Neumann)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everybody,

We’re working on an app that’ll turn workdocs in Monday to a full fledged website, available outside of Monday. You’d be able to use it to create documentation sites, wikis, blogs, content sites and more.

If you’d like to get early access to the app, hear more about it and help us design it, please sign up using this form or respond here.

Thank you!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Saggi!

Feel free to also post this in our dedicated apps section too (if you haven’t already!) → Share your monday apps! - monday Community Forum
